TimeoutError: Timed out waiting for model:
  mysql-k8s/0 [executing] active: 
  mysql-k8s/1 [executing] active: 
  mysql-k8s/2 [executing] active:

AssertionError: mysql router application status not indicating that refresh incompatible
assert 'incompatible' in 'Refreshing. Check units >=2 are healthy & run `resume-refresh` on unit 2. To rollback, `juju refresh --revision 1099`'
 +  where 'Refreshing. Check units >=2 are healthy & run `resume-refresh` on unit 2. To rollback, `juju refresh --revision 1099`' = <Application entity_id="mysql-router">.status_message
